title: Bridge Essay: Default mode network activation and Transcendental Meditation practice: Focused

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Language as mantra — mantra meditation, inner speech, focused attention, verbal repetition.

**Default mode network activation and Transcendental Meditation practice: Focused Attention or Automatic Self-transcending?** — Brain Cogn. PMID: 27816783. DOI: 10.1016/j.bandc.2016.08.009. This study used subjective reports and eLORETA analysis to assess to what extent Transcendental Meditation (TM) might involve focused attention-voluntary control of mental content. Eighty-seven TM subjects with one month to five years TM experience participated in this study. Regression analysis of years TM practice and self-reported transcendental experiences (lack of time, space and body sense) during meditation practice was flat (r=.07).
